description_long: This is a medium-sized, polygonal wooden barrel with a slightly tapered body and a wide, open top filled with a light blue liquid. The barrel features a textured wood grain surface, giving it a rustic appearance, and is reinforced by two thick, gray metallic bands—one near the top and one near the bottom. Small gold-colored metal brackets are visible at the rim, adding both structural support and decorative detail. The interior appears hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold liquids or other materials. The overall construction is robust, making it suitable for urban environments such as streets, parks, or storage areas. No handles or visible markings are present on the exterior.
description: A polygonal wooden barrel with metallic bands and gold brackets, filled with a light blue liquid. It has a rustic, reinforced design and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top with blue liquid, wood grain texture, and metallic bands with gold brackets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the polygonal wood panels and the metallic banding, with a clear view of the gold bracket.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open top and metallic reinforcements, with less emphasis on the gold bracket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible wood grain swirl and metallic band, gold bracket in focus.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: gray metal hoops at top and bottom
